rationale: The citation is used in the core model setup, where the authors explicitly state that their approach is built around a multivariate probit (MVP) consideration component from Edwards and Allenby (2003). This is not a background list citation; it anchors how consideration-set membership is modeled in the paper. The citing paper then adds a multinomial probit choice stage and dynamic/error-structure features, positioning its contribution as a development beyond a basic MVP specification.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on the MVP framework referenced to Edwards and Allenby (2003) for modeling brand consideration, then extends it by combining MVP with an MNP choice stage in a two-stage model for panel choice data. It further augments this setup with dynamics and heterogeneity to recover unobserved consideration sets.
